name: rtfi
title: RTFI - Real-Time Instruction Compliance Risk Scoring
description: Predicts when AI sessions are at risk of ignoring your instructions, enabling proactive intervention before failures occur. Tracks context length, agent fanout, autonomy depth, and decision velocity to calculate a real-time compliance risk score.
features: Real-time risk scoring based on session factors
Session history and analytics via CLI commands
Session analyzer agent for root cause analysis
Risk scoring skill for threshold tuning guidance
